description_en: Antananarivo may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 17 halal restaurants and 7 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Antananarivo, Madagascar, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Antananarivo: 20 halal restaurants listed, 7 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
